description_long: This house features a simple rectangular brick structure with a prominent, weathered metal hip roof showing visible rust and wear. The brickwork is laid in a regular horizontal pattern, giving the exterior a classic urban look. One side of the house includes a single window and a recessed entryway, both framed with light-colored trim. The roof overhangs slightly, with visible seams and fasteners along the eaves. The entryway appears open, leading into a dark interior space with a tiled floor. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on durability.
description: A small brick house with a rusted metal hip roof, a single window, and an open entryway framed in light trim.
description_view_0: The view shows a solid brick wall with no windows or doors, topped by a rusted metal hip roof.
description_view_1: This side displays another uninterrupted brick wall and the weathered metal roof, with rust patches more prominent.
description_view_2: This view reveals the main entryway and a single window, both framed in light trim, along with the tiled floor inside.
description_view_3: The view shows a plain brick wall similar to the opposite side, with the hip roof above.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed open entryway with light trim, no porch or decorative elements
